_comment: WORKED EXAMPLE. Copy to spec.json and edit. Hand it ANY clips — alternate takes, separate shots, or existing reels — and it assembles them top-to-bottom into one vertical Short. Replace every /ABSOLUTE/PATH/... path. Per segment: 'kind' is OPTIONAL (portrait/landscape auto-detected from the source; legacy 'face'/'laptop' still accepted); set 'grade': true on talking-head/skin shots for a warm relight; on wide clips use 'fit': 'cover' to crop full-frame or omit it for a blurred fill. 'beat' is a free-text label for your own reference. 'blocks' group consecutive same-orientation clips (hard cuts inside a block; a 0.2s crossfade fires between blocks). Anything omitted falls back to house-style DEFAULTS in build.py. Full schema + rules: references/render-notes.md.
title: Your punchy on-screen title
